name: laravel-agent
description: AI-powered Laravel development assistant with Claude Code plugin development tools. 35 skills, 30 agents.

plugins.name: laravel-agent
plugins.description: Complete Laravel development assistant with 30 specialized agents for architecture, features, modules, services, APIs, testing, database, auth, Livewire, Filament, queues, AI/LLM, deployment, CI/CD, security, WebSockets, feature flags, migrations, code review, git workflow automation, and Claude Code plugin development (plugin scaffolding, command/agent/skill/MCP creation, and publishing)
